examples: Both countries agreed that normal relations would be based on noninterference in each other's internal affairs.
Coexistence necessitates the total noninterference by any power in the internal affairs of another.
That is how evolution works, and why there is the Universal law of noninterference.
Arrington and Huffington have both been around long enough to know that noninterference guarantees are worth only as much as it costs to make them go away.
